en.title: Short Story
en.prompt: Write an engaging short story in English, prompted by the following keywords: [list of keywords]. Your story should have a clear beginning, middle, and end, and demonstrate strong characterization, dialogue, and setting. You have a maximum of 600 words, and can use any tense or point of view. Feel free to be as creative and imaginative as possible.
en.remark: Write a short story using the few words you provide. Contributed by @LIyvqi.

metaDescription: Need a story? Provide keywords for an engaging short story. Strong characters, dialogue, and setting in under 600 words.

faq.q: Can the AI write coherent stories using rare words?
faq.a: Common words work well. Rare words (mellifluous, perspicacious) get stacked awkwardly, making the story feel pretentious. Pick common but combinable words (data, apple, run) for natural stories. Limit rare words to 2 or fewer.

faq.q: Can students understand this story on their own?
faq.a: The prompt translates and explains, so students can follow even when words exceed their level. If the explanation is still too hard, append "keep vocabulary in the explanation at CEFR A2 or below" to lock the explanation to low difficulty.
